recommended_actions.title: Swap Two Car Commutes for Active Transit
recommended_actions.description: Replace two drives per week with walking, cycling, or public transport to reduce petrol consumption.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Single-occupancy petrol vehicles are among the highest contributors to personal greenhouse gas emissions. Transitioning just two trips a week directly scales down fossil fuel combustion.

recommended_actions.title: Prioritize High-Speed Rail for Regional Journeys
recommended_actions.description: For medium-distance domestic trips, opt for trains instead of flying or solo driving.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Aviation has an intense warming impact due to high-altitude radiative forcing. Trains operate at a fraction of the carbon intensity per passenger-kilometer.

recommended_actions.title: Switch to a 100% Green Electricity Plan
recommended_actions.description: Contact your utility provider to transition your standard electricity plan to a certified renewable energy source tariff.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Decarbonizing your home grid supply eliminates emissions associated with coal and gas power plants, making your daily appliance use net-zero.

recommended_actions.title: Elevate to Weekend Plant-Based eating
recommended_actions.description: Build on your flexitarian baseline by committing to 100% plant-based meals every Saturday and Sunday.
recommended_actions.why_matters: While a flexitarian diet is great, further reducing dairy and meat intake during weekends dramatically curtails global agricultural emissions and land-use pressure.

recommended_actions.title: Practice Eco-Driving Habits
recommended_actions.description: Optimize your driving style by maintaining steady speeds, accelerating gently, and turning off the engine during idling.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Inefficient driving habits can waste up to 20% more fuel. Smoother mechanical operations yield immediate, measurable carbon and cost savings.

chat_messages.content: Hello! I am your Leafstep Climate Coach. I can help you understand your footprint, suggest ways to save carbon, and automatically track your daily activities. Ask me anything, or say 'Coach, log a 15km EV drive' to try automated logging!
